heading: Footprints
description: We have an in-house software called Footprints, customised for each client based on their on-ground needs. The application has been designed with consumer need analysis.
image_alt: Footprints asset tracking dashboard by Tag RoBo Tech

value_props.title: Customised per client
value_props.description: Every deployment is shaped around your sites, assets, and operational workflows — not a one-size-fits-all template.

value_props.title: Need-led design
value_props.description: Built from consumer need analysis so teams get practical visibility, not cluttered dashboards.

value_props.title: ERP-connected
value_props.description: Seamless integration with your ERP via API for reconciled, audit-ready data flows.
